title: phyllanthus pudens
intro: Phyllanthus pudens, also known as the dwarf phyllanthus, is a small shrub native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pudens include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and improve immune system function. Phyllanthus pudens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, extracts, and capsules, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
